update_logs: 1.1.4: Completely overhauled linter.ps1 with advanced OS dev guards to catch ABI mismatches, Makefile omissions, and strict UEFI text encoding rules.
1.1.2: Re-architected boot sequence to unify the kernel into the UEFI bootloader, implemented mtools virtual floppy booting, and added a detailed visual text-mode OOBE installer.
1.1.1: Implemented automated GitHub Release publishing and the custom vibe-coded linter (linter.ps1).
1.1.0: Added Audio subsystem, Brightness controls, WiFi/BT toggles, blankDrop (AirDrop/QuickShare), and a Chrome-equivalent rendering engine in blankBrowser.
1.0.1: Added blankC dependencies, App Store, and System Info module.
1.0.0: Initial release featuring BDRM, blankUI, and .bloe support.
